full_text:
Fu Gan (Yancai) 傅幹 (彦材)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fu Gan (傅幹), styledYancai (彦材), was born in Beidi. Advised Cao Cao to concentrate on civil affairs rather then campaign against Wu. Fu Gan was affiliated with Ma Teng and the Wei Kingdom. Fu Gan lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
